action_set_definitions.name: get_network_topology
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current network inventory, including nodes (gNodeB, Edge, Core) and physical links with their current capacity, load, and latency.

action_set_definitions.name: get_slice_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the status and configuration of all existing network slices (S-NSSAIs).

snssai.description: Optional specific slice ID to filter results.

action_set_definitions.name: get_budget
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the remaining financial credits available for network operations and upgrades.

action_set_definitions.name: configure_slice
action_set_definitions.description: Provisions or updates a network slice with specific performance targets. Costs credits if instantiation is required.

target_status.description: The desired state of the slice.

throughput_requirement_mbps.description: Guaranteed or aggregate bit rate requirement.

action_set_definitions.name: upgrade_link_capacity
action_set_definitions.description: Increases the capacity or reduces the latency of a physical link by upgrading hardware. Consumes credits.

link_id.description: The ID of the link to be upgraded.

action_set_definitions.name: run_network_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates traffic load across the network to validate if slices meet their KPIs under stress. Returns real-time metrics.

state_description.nodes: List of active network nodes (routers/switches) and their processing capabilities.
state_description.links: List of physical links connecting nodes, including source, target, capacity (Gbps), current_load, and latency (ms).
state_description.traffic_demands: Current source-to-destination traffic requirements that must be routed through the network.
state_description.budget_remaining: The remaining financial resources available for network upgrades and maintenance.
state_description.global_performance: Aggregated network health metrics such as average packet loss and total congestion score.
